section_name: Invalidation of disabled person parking permit
chapter_title: Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
text:
The Department of Transportation shall invalidate a disabled parking permit issued under ORS 811.602 (Disabled person parking permit) if any of the following occurs:

(1) The department receives information that the person issued an individual or “Wheelchair User” placard or permit has since obtained a driver license or driver permit issued by another jurisdiction or has since obtained an identification card in another jurisdiction that is similar to the person’s identification card issued by this state.

(2) The department receives notice that the person issued a disabled parking permit is deceased.

(3) The department determines that the disabled parking permit was issued under fraudulent circumstances.

(4) The department determines that the person, program or family for which the permit was issued no longer qualifies for the permit. [2021 c.630 §3]

Note: 811.628 (Invalidation of disabled person parking permit) was added to and made a part of the Oregon Vehicle Code by legislative action but was not added to ORS chapter 811 or any series therein. See Preface to Oregon Revised Statutes for further explanation.

## Title 59
### Chapter 811. Rules of the Rd. for Drivers
##### § 811.628 — Invalidation of disabled person parking permit

The Department of Transportation shall invalidate a disabled parking permit issued under ORS 811.602 (Disabled person parking permit) if any of the following occurs:

(1) The department receives information that the person issued an individual or “Wheelchair User” placard or permit has since obtained a driver license or driver permit issued by another jurisdiction or has since obtained an identification card in another jurisdiction that is similar to the person’s identification card issued by this state.

(2) The department receives notice that the person issued a disabled parking permit is deceased.

(3) The department determines that the disabled parking permit was issued under fraudulent circumstances.

(4) The department determines that the person, program or family for which the permit was issued no longer qualifies for the permit. [2021 c.630 §3]

Note: 811.628 (Invalidation of disabled person parking permit) was added to and made a part of the Oregon Vehicle Code by legislative action but was not added to ORS chapter 811 or any series therein. See Preface to Oregon Revised Statutes for further explanation.

The department determines that the person, program or family for which the permit was issued no longer qualifies for the permit. [2021 c.630 §3]
